texto: I think Nina Simone has had an amazing journey. She was spicy and she had attitude and she didn't care, she wanted her money in a paper bag and don't mess with me and I've been doing some research on that so.
explicacao: Citação de Nia Long sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “I think Nina Simone has had an amazing journey. She was spicy and she had attitude and she didn't…” articula reflexao, journey, money em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como viagem e money.

texto: I know for me like I have a reputation of being kind of tough, I have a reputation of also being the girl next door, kind of sweet but I have standards and my thing is, it's me on that screen and I don't have control over everything in this and I'm grateful and thankful.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Nia Long: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I know for me like I have a reputation of being kind of tough, I have a reputation of also being …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que gratidao, grateful, girl pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de girl e door.

frase_original: I know for me like I have a reputation of being kind of tough, I have a reputation of also being the girl next door, kind of sweet but I have standards and my thing is, it's me on that screen and I don't have control over everything in this and I'm grateful and thankful.
